lazyshooting.description: Set various configurations for Lazy Shooting

lazyshooting.ammunitionui: Display your ammunition in real time!
lazyshooting.autosrack: If true, guns will automatically rack and stay racked when ammo is available.
lazyshooting.indestructiblegun: If true, guns will not be destroyed.
lazyshooting.neverjam: If true, guns will never jam.
lazyshooting.recoiless: If true, guns will not have recoil.
